content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names how the client is showing up, not just what he's saying, and reads precede questions throughout. Turn 2 explicitly tracks somatic state ('what does that actually feel in your body'). Turn 4 names the redirect move in real time ('That move you just made — from the tightness in your chest back to the situation — I noticed it'), distinguishing said from shown. Turn 8 catches the micro-pullback after 'invisible.' Turn 10 names the rush signature ('explained why that feeling doesn't matter. That happened fast'). Turn 12 catches the specific linguistic shift ('humiliating. That's not the same as frustrated') — a precise read of the word that landed differently. Turn 14 reflects back the weight rather than engaging the content redirect. Reads are specific, timely, and operative — they consistently change the direction of the conversation and crack the defense. The aggressive-victim/trapped stance is being read implicitly through each refusal to follow the content back to the org chart, though it's not named at the pattern level.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens by directing attention to somatic experience rather than engaging the content of the trap."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the redirect move in real time — distinguishes said from shown, read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Brief acknowledgment of duration; question is good but no specific read named here."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the pullback after 'invisible' — specific linguistic/energetic read at the moment it happened."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the rush signature explicitly ('That happened fast') — a precise AoA read."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the word-level shift from frustrated to humiliating — catches the more vulnerable feeling surfacing."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the weight rather than the content; names duration of carrying it, which lands the breakthrough."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["trappedness-feeling", "aggressive-victim-stance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fear-triangle", "fight-or-roll-over-binary"],
  "notes": "Pattern-level reads (fear triangle, fight-or-roll-over binary) are not named explicitly, but the moment-to-moment reads are specific, somatic, linguistic, and timely. Solidly a 3."
}
